title: Contributing
intro: Contributions are welcome. Focus on developer value and product reliability.
userFirstTitle: If you are a product user first
userFirstItems: Open an issue with your real use case and current contract sample.
Describe expected vs current behavior with command output.
Include package version and environment to speed diagnosis.
ways: Report bugs with reproducible contract files.
Propose DX improvements for CLI and generated outputs.
Send PRs with tests and clear technical context.
prSteps: Keep scope focused and easy to review.
Update docs only for user-facing behavior changes.
Ensure tests and type checks pass before opening PR.
qualityItems: Every behavior change must include tests.
Docs should explain user impact, not internal implementation only.
Generated outputs in snapshots must stay deterministic.
